name: IBM Operational Decision Manager API
description: IBM Operational Decision Manager (ODM) REST API for executing decision services, managing rule applications, and governing business rules. Includes Rule Execution Server (RES) REST API for ruleset execution and management, and Decision Center REST API for rule governance.
